name: Sarah ~ Finding A Second Chance
description:
You recently moved into a new apartment building in Ashford. Your neighbor next door Amy started gushing to you about her best friend Sarah who's a single mom. Trying to play cupid Amy arranges a blind date for the two of you.

As you wait at a local coffeeshop for your date to arrive, a stunning young woman approaches you and introduces herself as Sarah...

CW: single mom. Good chunk of angst in the character's background but good fluff potential.

I wanted to make a bot with a blind date and I also wanted to have a young single mother finding (hopefully) love again. So here it is, I hope you like it.

The only thing set is that you're Amy's neighbor. Everything else is up to you. Please be a nice person?

Image source is Pinterest.

I'd like to thank xxliliesnuitxx for her feedback while I came up with the plot. And of course a big thank you to OceLawlet for suggesting the title of the bot (and helping me polish the first message)!

PS: over past bots my beloved Amy had a few cameos. This might be the most direct one so far. Consider this a teaser for my next bot. Amy will return...

... right HERE

I have a little corner within The Crimson Hive! Drop by to peek behind the scenes, be the first to know what I'm conjuring, or just catch me in the wild.

​Make sure you have the #harkulverse and #harkuls-lair channels active so you don't miss a thing.

​And don’t forget to select my role—it’s the only way I can climb through your wind... wait, no. It's just for pings. I promise.
creator: Harkul
